# Basic Minimal

## What this sleeve is
Upstream compiler sample copied locally for dry-run validation.

## Category
social-communication

## What makes it unique
This sleeve is specialized around these areas: support.
It does not currently rely on explicit trigger-based routing.

## What to open next
- `sleeve.json` - actual source JSON
- `STRUCTURE.md` - high-level structure summary
- `NEOSTACKS.md` - stack-level breakdown
- `NEOBLOCKS.md` - inferred neoblock grouping by stack
- `MOLT-BLOCKS.md` - block inventory in natural language
